generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for raw point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLidarPointCloudData
]
instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseDepthData
]
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for vehicle state data (speed and steering angle)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VedderESCStateData
]
instance MotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]
instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for steering control"
]
instance HokuyoLidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]
instance IntelDeepsenseDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]
instance VedderESCStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderElectronicSpeedController
]
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarPointCloudData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, ROS2
]
instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera",
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseDepthData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]
instance ESCStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data (speed and steering angle) from Vedder ESC",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VedderESCStateData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]
instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-clustered object tracks from LiDAR point clouds",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarPointCloudData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]
instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for distributed communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]
instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of ROS2 nodes",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]
instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud clustering and tracking",
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANService, KalmanFilterService
]
instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing object tracks and vehicle state data",
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state visualization",
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on Digital Twin",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote ACC control via UI",
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]
instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path",
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathVisualizationInsight
]
instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks",
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeseriesReportInsight
]
instance DBSCANService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering for LiDAR point clouds",
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksInsight
]
instance KalmanFilterService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedObjectTracksInsight
]
instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed and steering angle"
]
instance ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of detected object tracks"
]
instance DrivingPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path visualization for decision-making"
]
instance TimeseriesReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks"
]
instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-clustered object tracks from LiDAR data"
]
instance ProcessedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Kalman-filtered object tracks for tracking stability"
]
instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC system control commands for lead vehicle detection and speed computation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote ACC control via user interface",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance MotorVoltageCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Motor voltage command for speed control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance SteeringAngleCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Steering servo angle command",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point clouds",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]
instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]
instance ACCControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control algorithm for lead vehicle detection and speed computation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, MotorActuation, SteeringServoActuation
]
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ROS2, Python38, Cpp, MATLABSimulink, SQLDatabase, DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlAlgorithm
]
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity (on external systems)"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking, enable/disable ACC) from the Controlling FE to the Motor Actuation and Steering Servo Actuation components for vehicle actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency maintained at ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity (per R7), with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across components (per R8), as required for real-time safety-critical operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Distributed architecture with Physical Twin Entity (vehicle hardware), Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity connected via ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi with OPC UA for inter-entity data translation, as specified in the ISO 23247 Data Translation FE."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during both development (for troubleshooting via data collection and monitoring) and operational phases (for real-time monitoring and remote management of ACC by operators), as users include developers and operators with distinct roles."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC functionality implemented per ISO 15622 Section 6.1–6.2 for Performance Class I (no road curvature capabilities), with remaining requirements omitted due to 1/10-scale vehicle constraints; no explicit uncertainty or error validation mechanisms detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication between components, and Wi-Fi network using OPC Unified Architecture (IEC 62541) for inter-entity data translation between Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage hosted on external cloud/server with SQL database; User Entity UI deployed on separate client machines."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework reference architecture for system design, and ISO 15622 for ACC control functionality specifications."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with strict latency (≤100 ms) and clock synchronization (100 ms) requirements; no specific cybersecurity protocols or accident mitigation measures detailed for remote operations."
]
